releases.title: ETISS Perf (daniel-dev, ETISS daniel-dev)
commands: mkdir -p $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-20.04 && ./build-riscv-tools.sh --compress --force --setup etiss_perf --docker ubuntu:20.04 --dest $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-20.04 ETISS_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_PERF_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss.git ETISS_PERF_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss-perf-sim.git && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-20.04/etiss_perf.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-20.04.tar.xz && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-20.04/etiss_perf_src.tar.gz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-src.tar.gz

mkdir -p $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-22.04 && ./build-riscv-tools.sh --compress --force --setup etiss_perf --docker ubuntu:22.04 --dest $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-22.04 ETISS_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_PERF_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss.git ETISS_PERF_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss-perf-sim.git && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-22.04/etiss_perf.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-22.04.tar.xz && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-22.04/etiss_perf_src.tar.gz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-src.tar.gz

mkdir -p $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-24.04 && ./build-riscv-tools.sh --compress --force --setup etiss_perf --docker ubuntu:24.04 --dest $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-24.04 ETISS_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_PERF_REF=daniel-dev ETISS_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss.git ETISS_PERF_URL=https://github.com/danielschloms/etiss-perf-sim.git && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-24.04/etiss_perf.tar.xz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-24.04.tar.xz && mv $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-24.04/etiss_perf_src.tar.gz $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/upload/etiss_perf_daniel-dev_etiss_daniel-dev//etiss-perf-src.tar.gz
